propositions: Review history and attestations are only reachable via scattered internal helpers, with no single documented read surface for a ticket's full audit trail.
A new audit_trail(ticket_id) aggregator returns the full retained plan-review sidecar history, completion attestation/sidecar record, and code reviews resolved via inbound relates_to links.

The returned AuditTrail typed dict has exact keys ticket, plan_reviews, completion, code_reviews; lists are newest-first and empty when none, and completion is None only when both attestation and sidecar are absent.
New all_review_results history enumerators walk REVIEW_RESULT events newest-to-oldest schema-tolerantly, complementing existing latest_ readers.
The read surface is exposed as a library function, a CLI command (rebar audit show <ticket> --output json), and a read-only MCP tool available even under REBAR_MCP_READONLY=1.
The subcommand is registered by adding help/audit.txt since known_subcommands is derived from help txt files, and code reviews reuse existing relates_to links without a new linking mechanism.
